name: Tangy Fruit Gelatin
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Cream cheese, softened & cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, heat water to boiling.
2. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
3. Pour 2-1/4 cups hot gelatin mixture into a blender container.
4. Set the remaining 1-1/4 cups gelatin mixture aside.
5. Add yogurt, cream cheese, and lemonade concentrate to the gelatin mixture in the blender; blend until smooth.
6. Pour into a 10-inch glass pie plate or quiche pan.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. Arrange fruit over top.
9. Refrigerate the reserved gelatin mixture until thick enough to coat a spoon.
10. Carefully spoon the thickened gelatin evenly over the fruit to glaze.
11. Cover and refrigerate overnight, or until set.
TIP: The hot gelatin mixture can be poured into 8 individual serving dishes or parfait glasses. Refrigerate until firm. Garnish each with fruit and spoon the thickened gelatin over the fruit to glaze.
